      Pick your next skill

      You reached 10 referrals. Choose one of the remaining skills to add to your dashboard.

      Unlock required

      Complete the referral task first

      Refer 10 friends successfully before you can unlock and add another skill to your dashboard.

      Complete registration

      Lock in your spot

      Add your details and selected skill to claim your free access.

      Welcome back

      Sign in to your dashboard

      Use the same full name and email you used when registering to access your dashboard.

      Registration complete

      Congratulations!

      Your free access is ready. Continue to your dashboard to get your referral link and start your task.
